hero.welcome: We design the math. You run the spin.™
hero.description: Stop wasting expensive lumber and composite sheets on imperfect vectors and unoptimized toolpaths. Led by veteran operator Raja Muhammad Ali Asghar, Ali CNC Ptv Ltd delivers production-ready 3D CAD files, watertight 2.5D vectors, and ultra-efficient G-code toolpaths straight to your inbox. We spent years on physical shop floors operating spindles and inhaling sawdust—so we design files that actually work on your machines. No lag, no crashed spindles, just clean, optimized cuts.

services.cad_desc: Send us your coffee-stained napkin sketches, dimensioned PDFs, or legacy blueprints. We translate them into watertight, high-precision 3D CAD files (.STEP, .IGES, .STL, .DWG) in AutoCAD and Onshape. Every draft is engineered with proper mechanical tolerances, ready for immediate nesting and fabrication on your shop floor.
services.cnc_desc: Get ultra-optimized toolpath files (.NC, .TAP, .GCODE) in Vectric Aspire tailored to your specific router spindle, feed rates, and material type. Our programming shaves hardwood and acrylic like butter—drastically reducing machine cycle times, protecting your expensive router bits from heat buildup, and keeping your spindle running smoothly.
services.dfm_desc: Before you mount a costly slab of walnut, cherry, or aluminum onto your vacuum table, let us run a virtual audit on your design. We check nesting tolerances, calculate safe stepovers, and verify stepdowns to ensure your router runs safely without crashing or throwing material.

why_choose.precision_desc: Standard digital designers output files with thousands of unnecessary nodes, causing your CNC machine to shudder, lag, and leave ugly chatter marks on your edges. We write pristine, math-perfect Bezier curves, guaranteeing silky-smooth gantry motion and flawless edge finishes.
why_choose.efficiency_desc: Sheet goods are expensive. Our nesting protocols pack your vectors with maximum spatial efficiency. We squeeze every single square millimeter out of your MDF, plywood, or plastic sheets—keeping money in your pocket instead of in the scrap bin.
why_choose.expertise_desc: Unlike desk-bound designers who think CNC stands for 'Click-n-Copy', our CEO Raja Muhammad Ali Asghar actually ran real machines, set mechanical zero offsets, and got his hands dirty in real workshops before taking our business 100% virtual. He knows exactly how vectors translate to physical raw materials.

faq.q1_title: Do you manufacture or ship physical wooden components?
faq.q1_desc: No. We operate a 100% digital, virtual CAD/CAM file factory. We design the digital blueprints and write the G-code; you run the spindle. By remaining entirely virtual, we save you from high shipping costs, customs delays, and logistics headaches, delivering perfect digital vectors directly to your inbox.
faq.q2_title: How do we start a project and verify the files?
faq.q2_desc: Simply click the WhatsApp or Email button to send us your sketches or files. We will review your requirements and provide a firm, competitive estimate. Once approved, we draft the vectors, run a full 3D simulation of the toolpaths, send you rendering validations, and deliver the final, watertight files.
faq.q3_title: What CAD/CAM software and file formats do you support?
faq.q3_desc: We support and export files compatible with all major commercial CNC machines and design suites. We deliver vector files in .DXF and .SVG; 3D relief files in .STEP, .IGES, and .STL; and raw G-code in .NC and .TAP. Our design stack includes Vectric Aspire, AutoCAD, and Onshape.
faq.q4_title: How fast is your B2B turnaround time?
faq.q4_desc: Standard 2D vectors and sheet nesting take 24 to 48 hours. Complex 3D modeling and deep toolpath optimization require 3 to 5 business days. If you have an active commercial deadline and your machine is currently sitting idle, let us know via WhatsApp and we will prioritize your file production.

experience.role1_subtitle: Ali CNC Ptv Ltd (Digital Freelance Empire)
experience.role1_desc: Left the physical workshop behind to run an elite, 100% online CAD/CAM freelance business. Specializes in turning complex math and drawings into watertight mechanical files and beautiful vector carvings.
experience.role2_title: CNC Machinist & Spindle Operator (The Shop-Floor Era)
experience.role2_desc: Spent years operating actual physical machines, inhaling grease, getting covered in splinters, and sweeping metric tons of physical sawdust before successfully escaping to the virtual world.
experience.role3_desc: Trained at the world's leading CNC academy to ensure every single G-code block has 100% real-world tested sanity.
experience.role4_desc: Officially certified freelance agent, generating watertight files that drive CNC routers globally.

footer.title: Stop Wasting Spindle Time. Let's Get Your Machine Cutting.
footer.description: Your CNC machine only makes money when the spindle is spinning and the cutter is moving. Eliminate file drafting bottlenecks, G-code geometry errors, and toolpath headaches. Partner with an expert who understands your shop floor.
footer.copyright: Ali CNC Ptv Ltd. Made in Rawalpindi with love, coffee, and 100% digital, physical-dust-free virtual sawdust in Pakistan. No routers were harmed in the hosting of this website.
